vulnerabilities.message: Email and Phone Number exposed to OpenAI OpenAI

location.lines:

  model: "gpt-4.1",
  messages: chatMessages,
  tools,
  tool_choice: "auto",
  max_completion_tokens: 4096,
})

)
```
